1.  **"Local Node—before prop_0—must prop_1"**: This phrase implies that if `prop_0` becomes true at any point, `prop_1` must have been true at some point strictly before it, and `prop_0` must have been false during the period from `prop_1`'s truth to `prop_0`'s truth. - P is `prop_2`
